serverUrlRequired: Enter your server address to get started.
serverNotSetUp: This server isn't set up yet. Configure it from the web interface first, then come back here.
openIdRedirect: You'll be taken to your identity provider to log in.
openIdNoToken: Something went wrong with the login. Try again.
logOutMessage: Disconnect from this server? Your local data stays on this device, but you'll need to reconnect to sync.
noBudgetsDescription: There are no budget files on this server or on this device.
reUploadConfirm: Upload "{{name}}" to the server as a new file?
keepLocalConfirm: Disconnect "{{name}}" from the server? It will become a local-only budget.
detachedHint: Some budgets are no longer linked to the server. Use the menu to upload them again or keep them local only.
orCreateNew: Or start fresh with a new budget
